name: Harmon Park
description: Harmon Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Paragould, AR. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Paragould Community Center-
description: Come play pickleball at Paragould Community Center- in Paragould, AR! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.
